---
title: "kalshi_base_url"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd)

# `kalshi_base_url()`

Get Kalshi Base URL

## Usage

```r
kalshi_base_url(demo = FALSE)
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `demo` | Logical. If 'TRUE', returns the demo environment URL. If 'FALSE' (default), returns the production URL. |

## Value

Character string with the base URL.

## Description

Returns the appropriate base URL for API requests.
